subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, O Cleaver of the Dawn and Subduer of the Winds! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the Hidden Treasure was made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا فالق الاصباح و مسخر الاریاح اسئلک باسمک الذی به ظهر الکنز المخزون
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence of; reunion with God
